title: Unsatisfactory Attendance, Progress, or Conduct
description: This chapter explains how education stations will apply the rules governing unsatisfactory attendance, progress, or conduct.  Standards requiring satisfactory attendance, progress, or conduct apply to chapters 30, 32, 35, 1606 and section 903, but do not apply to section 901 or the Antiterrorism Act of 1986
keywords: attend, reduction, unsat, reject, chapter, conduct, benefit, NCD, IHL, Higher Learning
